sections.paragraph: ἀνήϰω [ἀνά, ἥκω; ‘to have come up to’ a point] in 3 pers. impf. be suitable, be proper Eph 5:4; Col 3:18. τὸ ἀνῆϰον, freq. used in honorary documents to express satisfaction of public expectation for good performance = befitting a good citizen: what is right Phlm 8. Cp. Engl. ‘come up with’ in sense of producing what is expected.
